query:
-- Check tiab_customers linkage to platform customers
SELECT 
  tc.tiabCustomerId,
  tc.companyName,
  tc.contactName,
  tc.customerExternalId,
  tc.matchType,
  tc.matchConfidence
FROM tiab_customers tc
ORDER BY tc.matchType, tc.companyName
LIMIT 40;
